name: Ham and Cheese Potato Bites
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup whipped cream cheese with chives
recipeInstructions:
1. Place potatoes in a lightly greased roasting pan. Bake at 400°F (200°C) for 50 minutes or until tender. Let cool.
2. Cut potatoes in half. Using a small spoon, scoop out most of the pulp from each potato half. Set shells aside.
3. Combine the potato pulp, cheese, and remaining ingredients; stir mixture well. Spoon mixture into potato shells.
- You can make to this point and store in refrigerator overnight.
4. Place potatoes on a rack in the roasting pan. Broil 5-6 inches from heat for 4-5 minutes or until golden.
